problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting may resolve How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
